summary: Retro 3D flip clock style countdown timer component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/countdown-flip-clock/src/CountdownFlipClock.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CountdownFlipClock` and `countdownFlipClockDefaultProps`, then register the `CountdownFlipClock` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Countdown Flip Clock Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/countdown-flip-clock to my project. Preserve the exported CountdownFlipClockProps API and register the CountdownFlipClock composition with the default props.
